metadata.description: The display name of the workbook.
The unique ID for the workbook.
The name of the Log Analytics workspace.
The resource group of the Log Analytics workspace.
The subscription ID of the Log Analytics workspace.

properties.serializedData:
{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"# ☁️ Cloud & Hybrid Threat Correlation
---
Detects attacks spanning both Azure and on-premises. An Azure resource deletion followed by on-prem admin logon from an unusual IP followed by firewall allow from that same IP = a cloud-pivoted attack in progress."},"name":"title"},{"type":9,"content":{"version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","parameters":[{"id":"timeRange","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"TimeRange","type":4,"isRequired":true,"value":{"durationMs":86400000},"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":3600000},{"durationMs":86400000},{"durationMs":259200000},{"durationMs":604800000}],"allowCustom":true},"label":"Time Range"}],"style":"pills","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"parameters"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## ☁️ Azure Control Plane Activity"},"name":"azure-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"AzureActivity
| summarize
    TotalOps = count(),
    FailedOps = countif(ActivityStatusValue == 'Failure'),
    WriteOps = countif(ActivityStatusValue == 'Success' and OperationNameValue has_any ('write', 'create', 'delete', 'update', 'action')),
    UniqueCallers = dcount(Caller)
| project TotalOps, FailedOps, WriteOps, UniqueCallers","size":4,"title":"Azure activity summary","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"tiles","tileSettings":{"showBorder":true,"titleContent":{"columnMatch":"","formatter":1},"leftContent":{"columnMatch":"TotalOps","formatter":12,"formatOptions":{"palette":"blue"}}}},"customWidth":"100","name":"kpi-azure"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"AzureActivity
| where ActivityStatusValue == 'Success'
| where OperationNameValue has_any ('delete', 'Delete')
| project TimeGenerated, Caller, CallerIpAddress, OperationNameValue, ResourceGroup, _ResourceId
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 30","size":0,"title":"Azure resource deletions","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"TimeGenerated","formatter":6}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-azure-deletions"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"AzureActivity
| where ActivityStatusValue == 'Success'
| where OperationNameValue has_any ('roleAssignments/write', 'vaults/secrets/write', 'networkSecurityGroups/securityRules/write', 'runCommand/action', 'Set federation')
| project TimeGenerated, Caller, CallerIpAddress, OperationNameValue, ResourceGroup
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 30","size":0,"title":"High-risk Azure operations","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"TimeGenerated","formatter":6}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-azure-highrisk"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 🔗 Cloud-to-On-Prem Attack Pivot"},"name":"pivot-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let AzureCallers = AzureActivity
| where ActivityStatusValue == 'Success'
| where OperationNameValue has_any ('write', 'delete', 'action')
| where isnotempty(CallerIpAddress) and CallerIpAddress != ''
| summarize AzureOpCount = count(), LastAzureOp = max(TimeGenerated)
    by CallerIP = tostring(CallerIpAddress), Caller = tolower(Caller);
let OnPremLogons = SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 4624
| where LogonType in (3, 10)
| where isnotempty(IpAddress) and IpAddress != '-' and IpAddress != '127.0.0.1'
| summarize OnPremLogonCount = count(), LastOnPremLogon = max(TimeGenerated), Computers = make_set(Computer, 5)
    by CallerIP = IpAddress;
AzureCallers
| join kind=inner OnPremLogons on CallerIP
| project CallerIP, Caller, AzureOpCount, LastAzureOp, OnPremLogonCount, LastOnPremLogon, Computers
| sort by AzureOpCount desc","size":0,"title":"IPs that made Azure control plane changes AND logged into on-prem Windows — cloud-to-on-prem pivot","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"AzureOpCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":100}},{"columnMatch":"OnPremLogonCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":100}},{"columnMatch":"LastAzureOp","formatter":6},{"columnMatch":"LastOnPremLogon","formatter":6}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"100","name":"table-cloud-onprem-pivot"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let AzureCallerIPs = AzureActivity
| where ActivityStatusValue == 'Success'
| where OperationNameValue has_any ('write', 'delete', 'action')
| where isnotempty(CallerIpAddress)
| summarize by CallerIpAddress;
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor in ('Fortinet', 'Palo Alto Networks', 'Cisco', 'Juniper')
| where DeviceAction in ('allow', 'Allow', 'permit', 'Permit', 'accept', 'Accept')
| where SourceIP in (AzureCallerIPs)
| summarize FWAllowCount = count(), DestIPs = make_set(DestinationIP, 5) by SourceIP
| sort by FWAllowCount desc","size":0,"title":"Azure-active IPs also seen in on-prem firewall allows","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"FWAllowCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":1000}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-azure-fw-overlap"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"AuditLogs
| where OperationName in ('Add member to role', 'Set federation settings on domain', 'Add application', 'Delete application')
| extend InitiatedByUPN = tostring(parse_json(tostring(InitiatedBy)).user.userPrincipalName)
| extend InitiatedBySP = tostring(parse_json(tostring(InitiatedBy)).app.displayName)
| extend Actor = iff(isnotempty(InitiatedByUPN), InitiatedByUPN, InitiatedBySP)
| project TimeGenerated, OperationName, Actor, Result, LoggedByService
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 30","size":0,"title":"Entra high-risk operations — role assignments, federation changes, app registrations","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"TimeGenerated","formatter":6}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-entra-highrisk"}],"styleSettings":{},"$schema":"https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json"}
